exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your retirement planning forward
items: Schedule conversations with your closest family members about your retirement plans and vision
Create a contact list of friends, neighbors, and community connections you want to maintain after retirement
Have a detailed conversation with your spouse or partner about retirement expectations and individual goals
Join or research volunteer organizations and community groups that align with your interests and values
Write and send personal letters or emails to old friends and colleagues to reconnect before retiring
Create a communication plan with adult children about your retirement support needs and boundaries
